flags.label: Browser
flags.description: Enable browser skill prerequisites section in the system prompt

flags.label: User Hosted Enabled
flags.description: Enable user-hosted onboarding flow

flags.label: Platform Hosted Assistants
flags.description: Enable the Vellum Cloud hosting option on the Hosting screen

flags.label: Contacts
flags.description: Show the Contacts tab in Settings for viewing and managing contacts

flags.label: Email Channel
flags.description: Enable the entire email integration: email CLI commands, email channel, sequences, email readiness probes, invite adapters, and the email-setup skill

flags.label: App Builder Multi-file
flags.description: Enable multi-file TSX app creation with esbuild compilation instead of single-HTML apps

flags.label: Mobile Pairing
flags.description: Show the Mobile (iOS) pairing card in Settings > Account

flags.label: Settings Developer Nav
flags.description: Control Developer nav visibility in macOS settings

flags.label: Developer Menu Items
flags.description: Show Component Gallery and Replay Onboarding in the menu bar

flags.label: CES Tool Exposure
flags.description: Register Credential Execution Service tools (credential-grant, credential-revoke, credential-list) in the agent loop

flags.label: CES Shell Lockdown
flags.description: Enforce untrusted-agent shell lockdown when CES credentials are active, restricting direct shell access to credentialed services

flags.label: CES Secure Command Installation
flags.description: Enable secure tool/command installation via CES instead of direct shell execution for untrusted agents

flags.label: CES Grant & Audit Inspection
flags.description: Surface credential grant and audit inspection endpoints for reviewing active grants and access logs

flags.label: CES Managed Sidecar Transport
flags.description: Use managed sidecar transport for CES communication when running in a containerized environment

flags.label: CES Credential Backend
flags.description: Route credential reads and writes through the CES process instead of accessing the encrypted store directly

flags.label: Billing Settings Tab
flags.description: Show the Billing tab in Settings when signed in, displaying credits balance and top-up

flags.label: Managed Sign In
flags.description: Enable managed (organization-hosted) sign-in flow in the onboarding experience

flags.label: Twitter / X Integration
flags.description: Enable the Twitter / X OAuth setup skill for connecting to the Twitter API

flags.label: GitHub Integration
flags.description: Enable the GitHub OAuth setup skill for connecting to GitHub

flags.label: Linear Integration
flags.description: Enable the Linear OAuth setup skill for connecting to Linear

flags.label: Spotify Integration
flags.description: Enable the Spotify OAuth setup skill for connecting to the Spotify API

flags.label: Todoist Integration
flags.description: Enable the Todoist OAuth setup skill for connecting to Todoist

flags.label: Discord Integration
flags.description: Enable the Discord OAuth setup skill for connecting to Discord

flags.label: Dropbox Integration
flags.description: Enable the Dropbox OAuth setup skill for connecting to Dropbox

flags.label: Asana Integration
flags.description: Enable the Asana OAuth setup skill for connecting to Asana

flags.label: Airtable Integration
flags.description: Enable the Airtable OAuth setup skill for connecting to Airtable

flags.label: HubSpot Integration
flags.description: Enable the HubSpot OAuth setup skill for connecting to HubSpot CRM

flags.label: Figma Integration
flags.description: Enable the Figma OAuth setup skill for connecting to Figma

flags.label: Notion Integration
flags.description: Enable the Notion setup skill for connecting to Notion

flags.label: Recommended Starts
flags.description: Show a curated row of recommended starting actions on the empty conversation page, ordered by relevance as confident first-click options

flags.label: Deploy to Vercel
flags.description: Enable the Deploy to Vercel / Publish option in the app workspace header share menu

flags.label: Managed Google OAuth
flags.description: Show the Google OAuth service card in Models & Services settings

flags.label: Embedding Provider Settings
flags.description: Show the Embedding service card in Models & Services settings

flags.label: Schedules Settings Tab
flags.description: Show the Schedules tab in Settings for viewing and managing schedules

flags.label: Quick Input
flags.description: Enable the Quick Input popover on right-click of the menu bar icon

flags.label: Expand Completed Steps
flags.description: Auto-expand completed tool call step groups instead of showing them collapsed

flags.label: Inline Skill Command Expansion
flags.description: Enable secure inline skill command expansion via !`command` syntax, with version-pinned approval and sandboxed execution at skill load time

flags.label: Channel Voice Transcription
flags.description: Auto-transcribe voice/audio messages received from channels (Telegram, WhatsApp) before processing

flags.label: Sounds
flags.description: Enable the Sounds tab in Settings and all app sound playback (event sounds, random ambient sounds)

flags.label: Message Text-to-Speech
flags.description: Show a speaker button on assistant messages to generate and play the message as audio via Fish Audio TTS

flags.label: Backward Releases
flags.description: Show older versions in the version picker, allowing rollback to previous releases
